15 Eldorado Springs Dr, Eldorado Springs, CO 80025, USA

Entering the Town of Eldorado Springs, immediately when the road turns to gravel turn left and walk up the trail that goes up and right.

There are a dozen apple trees of various varieties in the first 100 yards of this trail.
